package rulecoverage

func NegativeMakeSliceInsideHotLoopSameShape() string {
    ruleID := "make_slice_inside_hot_loop_same_shape"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "make([]T, ...) scratch slices recreated inside loops instead of being reused."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
